overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 depicting a player walking through a desert badlands canyon, discovering an isolated trailer campsite, interacting with an NPC via dialogue options, and exploring the camp before departing back into the wilderness.

scene_state.functional_zone: desert canyon trail with red rock formations

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along a dirt path through the desert canyon, observing the rock formations and sparse vegetation

entered.detail: tall reddish-orange rock formation running along the left side of the path with layered sedimentary textures
dry bushes and scrub vegetation scattered across the sandy ground
distinctive spiky desert trees dotting the landscape against the rock formations
layered red rock formations extending into the hazy distance

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a first-person view walking through an open desert canyon. Tall red rock cliffs dominate the left side while sparse desert vegetation including Joshua trees and dry shrubs dot the sandy terrain. The sky is clear and blue, with bright midday sun casting sharp shadows across the path.

scene_state.functional_zone: approaching isolated trailer camp in desert badlands

events.description: a white trailer with satellite dish becomes visible in the distance ahead
camera slows approach as it nears the trailer campsite

agents.ego_description: walking toward the trailer camp, slowing down as the destination comes into view

notable_agents.action: female character sitting on a crate outside the trailer, appearing to be waiting

entered.detail: weathered white and blue trailer with satellite dish on roof, parked on a flat sandy area
tall saguaro cactus standing prominently near the path

segments.scene_description: As the camera advances through the canyon, a trailer campsite appears in the distance. The red rock cliffs recede into the background as the focus shifts to the approaching camp. A tall saguaro cactus stands on the right, and a female NPC becomes visible sitting outside the trailer.

scene_state.functional_zone: makeshift desert campsite with trailer, fire pit, and training equipment

events.description: dialogue options appear on screen indicating interaction with the seated NPC
camera begins circling around the trailer to view the campsite from different angles

agents.ego_description: approaching the NPC and engaging in dialogue, then circling around the trailer to examine the camp setup

notable_agents.action: seated woman engaging in conversation with the player, gesturing with her hands

entered.detail: stone fire pit with burning fire in front of the trailer entrance
heavy red punching bag hanging from a metal frame next to the trailer
two red plastic chairs placed near the trailer entrance
weathered American flag hanging on the side of the trailer
green and red patio umbrella providing shade over lounge chairs
two weathered lounge chairs under the umbrella shade

segments.scene_description: The camera arrives at the campsite and engages in dialogue with the seated NPC. The trailer is covered in posters and graffiti art. As the camera circles the camp, it reveals a fire pit, red plastic chairs, an American flag, a heavy punching bag for training, and a shaded lounge area with an umbrella. The scene is rich with details of a lived-in desert outpost.

scene_state.functional_zone: desert canyon trail departing from campsite

events.description: leaving the trailer campsite behind and returning to open desert terrain

agents.ego_description: walking away from the trailer camp, heading back into the open desert canyon

entered.detail: large reddish boulders along the path casting shadows on the ground

segments.scene_description: The camera departs from the campsite, leaving the trailer and all its amenities behind. As the player walks back into the open desert, the red rock cliffs draw closer again on the left side. The camp fades into the background as the terrain returns to the sparse desert canyon landscape.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from the solitude of a red rock canyon into a detailed desert campsite and back into the wilderness. It begins by traversing a sandy path beneath a clear blue sky, with towering red cliffs on the left and sparse Joshua trees dotting the terrain. As the camera advances, the cliffs recede and the focus shifts toward a distant trailer outpost where a female NPC sits beside a tall saguaro cactus. The scene then expands into a detailed exploration of the lived-in camp, circling past graffiti-covered walls, a fire pit, an American flag, and a training punching bag. Finally, the camera departs from the amenities of the outpost, leaving the camp behind as the red rock cliffs draw closer once more and the landscape returns to the open desert canyon.
